kit.name: TD613 PUA Badge Provenance Attestation Renderer v7.2.1 — bridge release
kit.subtitle: Dark live-send badge lab with stable 7.2.1 canon, sendable probe builder, dual signature-lane notes, and reconciled TD613 trust grammar.

sendable_files.02: Verify command with receipt-completion return contract.
sendable_files.03: Minimal render JSON. Send second when render proof is needed.
sendable_files.04: Extended render JSON with receipt-only return contract.

trust_profile.binding_fragment_derivation: first 7 hex chars of SHA-256 over binding_event_text.txt (NFC UTF-8)
trust_profile.intended_use: Source-of-truth config for generators, labs, and verifier surfaces so the TD613 stack emits one public trust grammar.
trust_profile.canonical_public_footer_note: Template for new attestations. Use current_published_footer only when referring to the already-published historical example.
dummy_proof_rules: Use payload {n} in templates and generators.
Use the fixed payload 5 / 2025-10-17 footer only when citing the already-published historical example.
Internal validation accepts legacy, legacy-compat, and sac-only.

historical_signed_zone.algorithm: Ed25519 / EdDSA detached .sig over canonical zone JSON
historical_signed_zone.purpose: signed badge/zone registry continuity and public verification

runtime_request_signing.purpose: middleware/runtime authorization flows such as request signing

boundary_modes.dev: simulation disabled by default in public ship
